title: fumaria sepium subsp. sepium
intro: Fumaria sepium subsp. sepium, also known as earth-smoke or herb-Paris, is a subspecies of the Fumaria plant family, which is a type of flowering plant in the poppy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antitumor activities. The health benefits of Fumaria sepium subsp. sepium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Fumaria sepium subsp. sepium is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
